overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player moves from a narrow graffiti-covered street into a commercial plaza, traverses an elevated walkway, and descends to a lower street level with heavy cyberpunk aesthetic featuring neon signs, holographic ads, and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban street with graffiti-covered wall

events.description: passing two NPCs on the left side of the sidewalk
approaching the Fuyutsuki building sign and end of the graffiti wall section

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a graffiti-covered wall with moving traffic on the right

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the ground leaning against the graffiti wall
person standing and leaning against the wall with arm raised

entered.detail: tall concrete wall covered in colorful cyberpunk graffiti and street art
large futuristic elevated highway or monorail structure spanning across the street
orange and white striped barriers separating sidewalk from street traffic
building with prominent red neon 'Fuyutsuki' signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow cyberpunk city street with a massive graffiti-covered wall on the left and traffic on the right. The camera moves forward past two NPCs resting against the wall, with the elevated highway structure visible ahead. The atmosphere is distinctly dystopian with vibrant wall art contrasting against the blue neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with palm trees and vending machines

events.description: turning left into a more open plaza area away from the main street
approaching stairway entrance while passing an NPC near construction barriers

agents.ego_description: turning left into a plaza area and approaching a stairway while navigating around construction barriers

notable_agents.action: person standing near red and white barriers drinking from a container

entered.detail: tall palm trees in concrete planters lining the plaza walkway
futuristic vending machines with glowing displays
large rectangular concrete planters containing vegetation
concrete stairway leading up to an elevated pedestrian level

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the narrow street into a more open commercial plaza featuring the Fuyutsuki building facade. Palm trees and vending machines populate the space as the camera turns left toward a stairway. An NPC stands near construction barriers as the environment shifts from enclosed alley to open pedestrian zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway connecting upper and lower street levels

events.description: ascending stairs to upper plaza level
descending stairs to lower street level
reaching the lower street level with different building facades and lighting

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs to an elevated walkway then descending to a lower street level while passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: tall digital kiosks displaying animated advertisements and holographic content
lower pedestrian walkway with different architectural style and lighting
covered section of walkway under an overpass or building structure

segments.scene_description: This segment covers the vertical transition through the city, ascending stairs to an elevated plaza with views of the street below, then descending to a lower walkway. The environment features digital advertising kiosks and scattered litter. The architecture shifts from open plaza to more enclosed urban spaces as the camera moves between levels.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with neon lighting

events.description: entering covered area with increased artificial neon lighting and reduced natural light
passing construction worker and equipment near the street barrier

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk passing pedestrians and observing street activity to the right

notable_agents.action: construction worker in yellow safety vest standing near equipment and barriers

entered.detail: concrete overpass or building overhang providing cover over the walkway
large illuminated billboard displaying advertisements on the building facade
construction barriers, ladders, and equipment near the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a covered walkway beneath the elevated highway, where artificial neon lighting dominates and the sky is mostly obscured. The crowd density increases with pedestrians walking in both directions. A construction worker stands near equipment on the right as the camera continues through this sheltered urban corridor with prominent digital advertising.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow, graffiti-laden alleyway into the sprawling, multi-leveled architecture of a neon-lit commercial district. It begins by moving past vibrant wall art and resting NPCs under blue neon lighting, heading toward the looming structure of an elevated highway. As the camera emerges from the enclosed street, the space opens into a pedestrian plaza featuring the Fuyutsuki building facade, palm trees, and vending machines before turning toward a stairway. The scene then shifts through a vertical transition, ascending to an elevated plaza with digital kiosks and descending back down toward a lower walkway. Finally, the camera glides into a sheltered urban corridor beneath the highway, where the sky vanishes and the environment becomes a dense, artificial tunnel of holographic advertisements and bustling crowds.
